title: Papa's Got a Brand New Bag
album: Papa's Got A Brand New Bag
why_this_song: Papa's Got a Brand New Bag by James Brown (1965) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "He's Not Too Fancy... But His Mind Is Might Clean"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "He's Doing The Jerk..."
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "He Ain't Too Hip... About That New Breed Thing"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Come Here Sister... Papa's In The Swing"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "He Ain't No Drag"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Papa's Got a Brand New Bag" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Papa's Got a Brand New Bag" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Papa's Got a Brand New Bag" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Papa's Got a Brand New Bag" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Papa's Got a Brand New Bag" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Papa's Got a Brand New Bag"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
